Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature

Brand Identity Guidelines — v2.0

Scroll

01 — Identity

Who We Are

ORN exists where sound meets the natural world — a label built on restraint, intention, and the belief that rhythm is nature's oldest language.

Mission

Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature

We curate artists and experiences that draw from the elemental — where electronic music becomes a conduit to the organic world.

Vision

A new ecology of sound

To build a global community united by deep listening, environmental consciousness, and music that breathes alongside the earth.

Values

Restraint. Depth. Presence.

We believe less is more. Every decision — visual, sonic, editorial — is made with intention and stripped of excess.

"Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished."
P

Primal

We connect to something older than culture — the pulse of living systems, the rhythm of seasons, the breath of forests.

E

Elemental

Stripped of decoration. Honest materials, honest sounds, honest communication — earth, air, water, fire.

M

Meditative

We create space for deep listening and contemplation — music and design that invites stillness within movement.

02 — Logo

The Mark

Three letters. Absolute weight. Inter Bold, optically corrected — a wordmark that stands without embellishment.

Primary — Dark Background
Primary — Light Background

Logotype Construction — Inter Bold

White on Black — Primary

Black on White — Secondary

Typeface

Inter Bold (700)

Letter-Spacing

+3px optical / 0.04em

Case

Uppercase only

Refinement

Optically corrected pair kerning

Kerning & Optical Refinements

Pair: O–R — Tighten slightly

ORN

The open bowl of O creates optical spacing before R's vertical stem. Apply −0.015em on the O→R pair to close the perceived gap.

Pair: R–N — Neutral / natural

ORN

The R leg and N's opening diagonal sit naturally. Retain standard Inter Bold auto-kern here — no manual adjustment needed.

Minimum Clear Space — Cap Height Unit (×)

ORN 1× cap-height 1× 1× 1× cap-height

Do

✓Use Inter Bold (700) exclusively for the wordmark
✓Always set in uppercase
✓Maintain +0.04em global tracking, −0.015em on O→R pair
✓Use white on black or black on white only
✓Allow 1× cap-height clear space on all sides

Don't

✗Use any weight other than Bold (700)
✗Add outlines, shadows, gradients, or effects
✗Stretch, condense, or distort letterforms
✗Use on coloured backgrounds without approval
✗Reproduce with inconsistent or default kerning

03 — Colour

The Palette

Black, white, and the space between — eleven tones that move from void to pure light, like dusk to dawn in a forest clearing.

Hover each swatch to reveal values. All tones are greyscale. No accent colours are defined in the ORN palette.

04 — Typography

Type System

Two typefaces in dialogue — Inter's geometric precision carries structure; Cormorant Garamond's organic curves carry soul.

Primary — Inter Bold

Inter — Functional Voice

Orchestrating
Rhythms

Inter is our structural typeface — used for all UI, headings, labels, captions, and the wordmark itself. Its clean geometry at Bold weight conveys precision and confidence without coldness.

300 Light Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature
400 Regular Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature
600 Semibold Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature
700 Bold ★ Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature
800 Extrabold Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature
900 Black Orchestrating Rhythms of Nature
Secondary — Cormorant Garamond

Cormorant Garamond — Poetic Voice

"Where the forest breathes,
the rhythm finds its form."

Cormorant Garamond is reserved for poetic copy, long-form editorial, pull quotes, and moments that require emotional resonance over structural authority. Never use it for the wordmark or UI elements.

05 — Voice & Tone

How We Speak

ORN speaks like the natural world — with patience, weight, and economy. We do not perform. We do not explain. We invite.

01

Sparse

Ask: Could one word replace ten?

We use as few words as necessary. Silence is not absence — it is space for the listener to arrive. Every word earns its place or it is removed.

"Deep listening. Unbroken."
02

Grounded

Ask: Does this sound like the earth or like marketing?

We are not hyperbolic. We don't promise transformation or use superlatives. We describe what is, and trust the listener's intelligence.

"Three tracks. Recorded at dusk, in the forest above Freiburg."
03

Poetic

Ask: Does this carry weight beyond its literal meaning?

When we speak of music, we speak of it as we would of landscape. We allow metaphor, but not decoration. Poetic precision, never ornament for its own sake.

"The record holds the sound of a season turning."

06 — Applications

In the World

The brand applied — from digital canvas to physical object, each execution honours the same principles of restraint.

Digital — Social / Artwork

ORN

Release artwork — centered wordmark, full field

Print — Programme / Press

ORN

White ground — event or editorial print

Merch — Garment Embroidery

ORN

Small chest placement, white thread on dark fabric

Digital — Website Header

ORN

Fixed nav — reduced scale, full weight retained

07 — Logo Downloads

Asset Library

All official ORN logo files — ready to download. Use the correct format for your medium. Never alter, recreate, or substitute these files.

For Print & Production

PDF / CDR

Vector formats — infinitely scalable. Use PDF for most print suppliers. CDR (CorelDRAW) for specialist production. Required for signage, vehicle livery, large-format print.

For Digital & Screen

PNG

Transparent background versions for digital use — social media, presentations, overlays, and web. Always use the correct colour version (white or black) for your background.

For General Use

JPG

Flat background versions. Use only when transparency is not supported — email signatures, certain CMS platforms. Prefer PNG or PDF where possible.

Which file should I use?

PDF

Printers, designers, large format, signage, vehicle wraps

CDR

Embroidery machines, vinyl cutters, CorelDRAW users

PNG

Websites, social media, presentations, Canva, Word docs

JPG

Only when PNG is not accepted — email platforms, some CMS

Important

Do not recreate, redraw, or substitute the ORN wordmark from type. Always use these supplied files. If you need a format not listed here or require a specific size or colour adaptation, contact the brand team before proceeding.
